_comment: Snippet for ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json on Linux/macOS, or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json on Windows. Copy the content inside the 'mcpServers' key of your config; do not overwrite the entire file.

vivado_via_uvx._comment: Alternative if installed as a package via uv / pip install vivado-mcp-server
